title: APEX PLAN_META.json (v7)
description: Structured metadata for a phase plan: tasks with spec_ref, verify_level, done_criteria, edge_cases, dependencies, and wave assignment. [שיפור 21, שיפור 39]

originating_requirement_id.description: Unique requirement ID (REQ-NNN) from SPEC.md that this task traces to

decision_mode.description: Dual-mode classifier: collaborator for product/irreversible decisions requiring human approval, replacement for autonomous technical decisions [F-005]

roundtable_needed.description: Flag for multi-faceted architectural decisions requiring multi-specialist roundtable session instead of 2-advocate debate [F-010]

negative_auth_required.description: Security tasks requiring negative authorization (deny) tests. When true, PASS verdict checks for deny/unauthorized/forbidden test patterns — missing patterns downgrade to PARTIAL [F-028]

task_class.description: M08 risk class (Phase 12.02): A=low (Trusted after 5 clean), B=medium (Trusted after 7-8 clean, cap=2), C=high (NO auto-escalation, permanent Supervised), D=irreversible (NO auto-escalation ever, hard cap=0). Authored by architect Step 1.8 using framework/docs/RISK-KEYWORDS.md. OPTIONAL during the v8 transition window; framework/scripts/migrate-plan-meta-v8.sh backfills 'B' for legacy PLAN_META files. Will become REQUIRED in a follow-up migration once all phase plans are migrated.

task_type.description: M12 task-type classifier (Phase 12.03): drives per-task-type CONTEXT_BUDGET profile selection. Orthogonal to task_class — a task can be task_class=C AND task_type=bug_fix. OPTIONAL during transition; defaults to 'new_code' when absent.

is_irreversible_now.description: M08.1 dynamic-Track-D flag (Phase 12.02). Static task_class=C tasks can execute as Track D when THIS invocation is irreversible (e.g., deploy now, force-push now). Bypasses Track D batching — fires the plain-language modal immediately.
